scope: class-1 durable knowledge state only; classes 2-4 are excepted by default

class_1_durable_knowledge_state.description: Canonical, durable facts that answer 'what happened' or 'what is true' across agents and sessions.
class_1_durable_knowledge_state.invariant: PG-first MANDATORY. JSON/SQLite/markdown may exist only as derived cache.

class_2_operational_telemetry.description: Ephemeral operational signals, diagnostics, latency, health snapshots.

class_3_versioned_source.description: Agent DNA, boot configuration, skills, policy documents, source code.
class_3_versioned_source.invariant: file-primary; PG may index but not own.

class_4_narrative.description: Human-readable narrative, journals, memory markdowns, canvas documents.
class_4_narrative.invariant: derived markdown; structured facts within narrative must be extracted to class-1 tables.

entries.notes: PG-first since TKT-0342/TKT-0698. state/tickets.json is a backward-compat mirror updated after PG writes; it must never be treated as primary truth.
No JSON cache. db-ticket.sh reads/updates sprint references but does not insert sprints.
PG insert is authoritative; memory/CHANGELOG.md is the human-readable derived narrative. Notion Archive DB C is also derived.
Two PG functions: pg_write_event (legacy) and pg_write_audit_event (TKT-0357). All callers go through the wrapper scripts. No JSON cache.
Source-only library. Emits one agent_events row per batch via pg-write-event.sh.
Current source of truth is memory/LESSONS.md (class-4 narrative). state_lessons PG table is planned under TKT-0362. lessons-staleness-state.json is class-2 telemetry only.
Current source of truth is state/sage-qa-log.json. verdict_log PG table is planned under TKT-0722.

excluded_scope_note: Classes 2-4 are intentionally not inventoried here. If a future state surface is suspected to be class-1, it must be added to this registry and approved via CHG.

enforcement_gate.implementation_note: Deterministic gate to be built as fast-follow CHG. See spec for requirements.
